pwa.iosInstallBody: Tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”.

address.areaPlaceholder: e.g. Mahalaxmi, Chabahil — or pick below
address.geoFailed: Could not get your location. Allow location access or drop a pin manually.
address.geoUnsupported: Your browser does not support location.
address.landmarkPlaceholder: e.g. "Next to Bhatbhateni, opposite the petrol pump"
address.selectCityForMap: Select a city to load the map.

apiState.errorMessage: Unable to load data. Please try again.

changePassword.success: Password changed — please sign in again
changePassword.title: Change password

deleteSellerAccount.deleted: Account deleted. We're sorry to see you go.
deleteSellerAccount.title: Delete your seller account?
deleteSellerAccount.warning: This is permanent. Your shop, all your product listings, reviews, and messages will be removed. If your products have any existing orders, deletion is blocked — contact support instead.

deliverTo.description: We use this for delivery fees and estimated arrival on product pages.

imageCrop.subtitle: Drag to position · use zoom to fit
imageCrop.title: Crop & adjust

logout.message: Are you sure you want to log out?
logout.title: Log out?

mapPin.ariaLabel: Map — tap to place your delivery pin
mapPin.hint: Tap the map or drag the pin to mark your exact spot.
mapPin.loadError: Map could not load. Check your connection and try again.

passwordReset.introReset: We'll email you a 6-digit code to confirm it's you, then you can choose a new password.
passwordReset.introSet: We'll email you a 6-digit code to confirm it's you. After that you can set a password and also sign in with email.
passwordReset.updated: Password updated — please sign in again
passwordReset.codeIntro: Enter the code we sent to {{email}} and choose your new password.

videoUpload.changeFile: Tap to choose a different file
videoUpload.fileSpec: MP4 or MOV · max 100 MB · 5–30 sec
videoUpload.noProducts: You have no products yet — add a product first, then film a video for it.
videoUpload.notVideo: That isn't a video file. Choose an MP4, MOV, or other video.
videoUpload.note: Draft = only you see it · Publish = live for buyers
videoUpload.orientSub: Record tall, like a TikTok or a Reel. Don't turn your phone sideways.
videoUpload.selectProduct: Select which product this video is for.
videoUpload.tipQuality: Good light, steady hands, and show the product clearly.
videoUpload.title: Add product video
videoUpload.tooLongError: Video is {{seconds}}s — trim to {{max}}s or less in your phone editor before uploading.
videoUpload.tooShort: Too short ({{seconds}}s) — must be at least {{min}}s
videoUpload.tooShortError: Video is {{seconds}}s — must be at least {{min}} seconds long.

auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.legalRequired: Please confirm you're 18 or older and agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy to continue.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with email and password — or continue with Google.
auth.registerSubtitle: Your name, email, and password — or continue with Google.
auth.resetCodeSent: Reset code sent to your email
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter the email address you signed up with. We'll send a code to reset your password.
auth.resetConfirmIntro: Enter the code sent to <email>{{email}}</email> and choose a new password.
auth.legalConsent: I'm 18 or older and agree to the <terms>Terms & Conditions</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

home.loadErrorMessage: Something went wrong fetching the catalog. Please try again.

search.title: Search
search.tryDifferent: Try a different search or clear your filters.

checkout.emptyMessage: Looks like you haven't added anything yet. Let's find something you'll love.
checkout.signInCheckout: Please sign in to complete checkout.
checkout.removeConfirm: Remove this item from your cart?

profile.noOrdersMessage: When you order, it shows up here.

addresses.chooseLabel: Choose a label (e.g. Home or Office)
addresses.emptyMessage: No saved addresses yet. Add Home, Office, or other spots for faster checkout.
addresses.label: Label
addresses.subtitle: Saved addresses — choose at checkout

tracking.noOrderMessage: Open tracking from My orders or right after checkout.
tracking.cancelOrderMessage: Cancel order #{{id}}? You can only cancel before BazaarCo pickup collects it from the seller.

wishlist.signInTitle: Sign in to see your wishlist
wishlist.signInMessage: Save products and sellers you love — they stay on your account.
wishlist.emptyMessage: Tap the heart on any product or seller to save them here.

bargains.emptyMessage: Bargain on any product to see your offers here.
bargains.title: Bargain
bargains.subtitle: Your offers and seller responses.

seller.storeCreatedKyc: Store created — complete KYC to start selling
seller.storeNameTooShort: Enter a store name (at least 2 characters)
seller.storeAddressHint: Where buyers can find your shop.

dashboard.noSalesYet: No sales data yet. Numbers will appear here when you start selling.
dashboard.frozenHint: Fix the issues described in each product, then acknowledge so our team can review and restore your listing.
dashboard.storeLinkShareUnsupported: Sharing isn't supported on this device — link copied instead
dashboard.storeLinkEditHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens. This is the address buyers will see.
dashboard.storeLinkTaken: That link is already taken — try another.
dashboard.storeLinkInvalid: That link isn't allowed — use 3-48 lowercase letters, numbers or hyphens.
dashboard.noPendingTasks: No pending tasks. You are up to date.
dashboard.noSalesChartMessage: Your daily sales will chart here once buyers start ordering. Share your store to land the first one.
dashboard.noSalesMetricsMessage: Your sales metrics will appear here once orders start coming in.

inbox.title: Orders
inbox.subtitle: Tap an order to print labels, message buyer, or update status.

products.title: Inventory
products.subtitle: Manage your catalogue — update stock, prices, and details.

ledger.title: Payouts
ledger.subtitle: Track settlements, fees and exactly what BazaarCo owes you.

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitleSeller: Reply fast. Buyers who wait > 1hr usually leave.
chat.subtitleBuyer: Chat directly with sellers about products and orders.

bargain.title: Bargaining
bargain.subtitle: Buyers can send you offers below your listed price. You set the lowest amount you'll accept on each product. Buyers can't see this limit.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Reply to every review. Buyers trust shops that listen.

storefront.title: My Store
storefront.subtitle: Customize how buyers see your store page.

videos.verifyRequired: Complete verification to add and manage videos

kyc.title: KYC verification
kyc.subtitle: Verify your identity to unlock selling, payouts and store features.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Your seller identity and store contact details.

analytics.title: My shop
analytics.subtitle: See how your store, products and sales are performing.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and notification preferences.
settings.alertsHint: Pick how we tell you about each thing. New-order alerts are always on.
settings.onboardingRequired: Complete seller onboarding to configure notifications and account settings.
settings.setPasswordSub: Add a password to also sign in with email
settings.resetPasswordSub: Send a code to your email
settings.deleteAccountSub: Permanently remove your shop, products, and all data. This can't be undone.

addProduct.addChoicesToUpload: Add choices to this option to upload images.
addProduct.addDiscountHint: Optional. Buyers see the lower price.
addProduct.allVersionsUseMainPhoto: All versions use your main photo.
addProduct.bargainFloorTooHigh: Must be {{max}} or lower (at least {{percent}}% below {{listed}})
addProduct.bargainGapHint: Must be at least {{percent}}% below the listed price. Max allowed: {{max}}.
addProduct.bargainOffersHintSingle: Offers below this price are declined automatically. Offers at or above it come to you to accept, counter, or decline. Buyers never see this limit.
addProduct.bargainOffersHintVariant: Offers below the min price are declined automatically. Offers at or above it come to you to accept, counter, or decline. Buyers never see this limit.
addProduct.bargainRequiredError: Required — set a lowest price to enable bargaining.
addProduct.bargainTooHighError: Must be {{max}} or lower (at least {{percent}}% below the listed price).
addProduct.bargainVariantsIntro: Allow bargaining on each version — each can have its own lowest price.
addProduct.bulkFillHint: Fills every version below — you can still change any row after.
addProduct.categoryLockedHint: Category can't be changed after a product is listed.
addProduct.categoryPickHint: Picking the right category shows buyers the right details — and helps them find you.
addProduct.checkVariantPriceStock: Every version has a price & stock
addProduct.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Handwoven pashmina shawl in charcoal grey, made from 100% Himalayan cashmere by artisans in Kathmandu. Soft, lightweight and warm — perfect for everyday wear or gifting. Measures 200×70 cm and comes in five colours to match any outfit.
addProduct.descriptionRequiredHint: Required — shown to buyers on the product page.
addProduct.enterLowestPrice: Enter a lowest price to enable bargaining
addProduct.fieldsNeedAttention: {{count}} field(s) still need attention — press {{action}} to see the list.
addProduct.frozenRestoreHint: Update the product below, then acknowledge from Inventory so our team can restore it.
addProduct.galleryImagesHint: More angles, details and the product in use.
addProduct.imageModeExact: Separate image for every exact variant
addProduct.keywordsHint: If you add this, it becomes more visible to the buyers.
addProduct.listUpdatesHint: This list updates on its own when you change options. Edit any row below.
addProduct.loadErrorMessage: It may have been removed. Go back to Inventory and try again.
addProduct.mainImageHint: The cover shoppers see first in search, the storefront and the cart.
addProduct.noMatchingSuggestion: No matching suggestion — add it as a custom detail below.
addProduct.optionsInfoTip: A version is one thing a buyer can pick and buy — e.g. Red / Medium — with its own price and stock. Turn this on when the same product sells in different colours, sizes, and so on.
addProduct.photoFallbackHint: Pick how photos work. Each version falls back to its own photo first, then its colour photo, then your main photo.
addProduct.photoModeExactDesc: Add a photo to each row in the table below.
addProduct.photoModeExactDescLegacy: Upload a separate photo for every version in the list below.
addProduct.photoModeExactLabel: Each version has its own photo
addProduct.photoModeExactLabelLegacy: A different photo for each version
addProduct.photoModeOptionDesc: Add one photo per {{attr}}. Sizes share it.
addProduct.photoModeOptionDescLegacy: Add one photo per choice — it shows on every matching version.
addProduct.photoModeProductDesc: Every version shows your main product photo.
addProduct.photoModeProductLabel: No, the photo is the same
addProduct.photosInfoTip: The main photo is your product's cover — it represents the listing in search, feeds and the BazaarCo hub. Add 1 main photo + 2–5 gallery photos.
addProduct.pickOptionTypeHint: Pick an option type above to start building variants.
addProduct.priceStockSingleHelper: Set one price and stock count for this product.
addProduct.priceStockVariantHelper: Set a price for each version. A discount is optional — buyers see the lower price.
addProduct.productNamePlaceholder: e.g. Oversized Cotton T-Shirt or Handwoven Pashmina Shawl
addProduct.resumedDraftBody: Picked up where you left off. Photos aren't saved with drafts — re-add them before publishing.
addProduct.reviewPublishSubtitle: One last look before your product goes live.
addProduct.reviewSaveSubtitle: One last look before saving your changes.
addProduct.saleAmountInvalid: Sale price must be a positive number below the regular price.
addProduct.setSamePriceStock: Set the same price & stock for all
addProduct.specSuggestionHint: Tap any suggestion to add it as a field. More detail builds buyer trust.
addProduct.titleRequiredHint: Required — buyers see this name first.
addProduct.toastDraftSaved: Draft saved — find it in your Inventory to continue
addProduct.toastFillDetailFirst: Fill in a product detail before saving a draft
addProduct.toastPublishFailed: Could not publish. Please try again.
addProduct.toastSaveFailed: Could not save changes. Please try again.
addProduct.validationBargain: Set a valid minimum price (below the listed price).
addProduct.validationPhotos: Add 1 main photo and 2–5 gallery photos.
addProduct.validationSalePrice: Sale price must be below the listed price.
addProduct.validationTitle: Product title needs at least 3 characters.
addProduct.validationVariantPriceStock: Every version needs a price and stock.
addProduct.versionCountSetPriceStock: {{count}} version(s) — set a price and stock for each
addProduct.versionNoLegacyDesc: One price and one stock for the whole product.
addProduct.versionPhotosQuestion: Do the versions look different in photos?
addProduct.versionYesDesc: Different colours, sizes, and so on.
addProduct.versionYesLegacyDesc: Set a price and stock for each version.
addProduct.versionsHelper: Like the same shirt in different colours or sizes.
addProduct.versionsLegacyHelper: Like a t-shirt in different sizes, or a phone in different colours.
addProduct.versionsQuestion: Does this come in different versions?
addProduct.warrantyToggleHint: Turn on to add the coverage details buyers ask about.
addProduct.warrantyToggleLabel: This product comes with a warranty
addProduct.whatVersionsHelper: Pick the choices — we make a row for every combination automatically.
addProduct.whatsDifferentHelper: Pick what changes — like colour or size — then add the choices. The price list below updates on its own as you go.

inventory.acknowledgeSuccess: Thanks — we'll review your fixes and restore the listing soon.
inventory.discardConfirmMessage: Your unsaved product listing will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
inventory.noMatchMessage: Try clearing the search or status filter.
inventory.pendingReviewNote: Submitted for review. You'll be notified when the listing is live again.
inventory.pricePerVariantHint: Price is set per variant — use Edit below to update variant prices.
inventory.submitForReview: I've fixed this — submit for review

orderDetail.awaitingOtherSellers: Accepted — waiting for other sellers to confirm
orderDetail.cancelMessage: Order #{{id}} for {{buyer}} will be cancelled. The buyer will be notified and refunded. This cannot be undone.
orderDetail.noOrderMessage: Open an order from the seller orders list.

productDelete.message: {{productName}} and its reviews, questions and ratings will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.
productDelete.title: Delete this product?

productView.frozenInstructions: Edit this product to address the feedback, then acknowledge from Inventory so our team can restore it.
productView.noProductMessage: Go back to your inventory and select a product to view.
productView.pendingReviewNote: Submitted for review. You'll be notified when the listing is live again.

verificationBanner.pendingMessage: Your KYC verification is under review — we'll notify you through email once it's done.
verificationBanner.rejectedFallback: Upload a clearer document to try again.

videoDelete.message: The video for {{productLabel}} will be permanently removed and buyers will no longer see it. This can't be undone.
videoDelete.title: Delete this video?

videoLibrary.draftHint: Draft — only you can see this video.

videoLibrary.publishedHint: Live — buyers can see this video.
videoLibrary.selectProductError: Select which product this video is for.
videoLibrary.subtitle: Products with video sell 2× more. Keep videos under 30 seconds.
